title: Property Consultant - Select CityWalk - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Select CityWalk - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Select CityWalk, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Ahmedabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Select CityWalk:
Select CityWalk is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Select CityWalk!
